data.title: GREEN: Add Residual References category + escalate_to_epic to red-team-reviewer.md
data.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## Description
Add category 7 'Residual References' to the Interaction Gap Taxonomy and escalate_to_epic to the finding type enum in red-team-reviewer.md.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] red-team-reviewer.md contains Residual References category
  Verify: grep -q 'Residual References' plugins/dso/agents/red-team-reviewer.md
- [ ] red-team-reviewer.md contains escalate_to_epic type
  Verify: grep -q 'escalate_to_epic' plugins/dso/agents/red-team-reviewer.md
- [ ] Original 6 categories still present
  Verify: grep -c '### [0-9]' plugins/dso/agents/red-team-reviewer.md | awk '{exit ($1 < 7)}'
